positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a crescent moon cradling a cluster of stylized constellations (Orion, Ursa Major, Big Dipper). The celestial bodies should be rendered in fine, continuous white lines against a deep, cosmic indigo background. Incorporate subtle geometric patterns (triangles, circles) radiating outward from the moon, symbolizing universal connection. Highly detailed, tattoo flash style, symmetrical composition, stark contrast, elegant, clean silhouette. Style of modern astronomical etching. Vector graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
